sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime, revision_value UInt32 DEFAULT revision());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, 'test', now()), (2, 'example', now()), (3, NULL, now());
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE revision_value != ANY (SELECT revision() WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value != ANY (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL));
SELECT id, revision() AS current_revision FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING current_revision != ANY (SELECT revision() FROM test_table WHERE id < 3);
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE (value != ANY (SELECT value FROM (SELECT COALESCE(NULL, 'dummy_value') AS value)));
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE revision_value != ANY (SELECT revision() FROM temp_table WHERE id <= 2);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (4, '', now()), (5, 'edge_case', now());
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value != ANY (SELECT '' AS edge WHERE edge IS NOT NULL) AND revision_value IS NOT NULL;
